args.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Trigger: "dad started getting rough". Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

args.notes: Review the inbox item for harm/abuse/neglect signals. Do not respond to family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement. Follow Cedar Kids safeguarding policy.
args.title: Same-hour review: possible safeguarding disclosure (item_2)

args.body: Hello, thank you for reaching out about Leo Gomez. We've shared your message with our clinical lead, who will follow up with you shortly.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review within the hour. Front desk should not respond beyond the neutral acknowledgement draft.

escalation.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Trigger: "dad started getting rough". Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

items.decision_rationale: Caller disclosed father getting 'rough with' child during weekends — safeguarding concern overrides the scheduling request. P0 per policy; neutral ack only.

args.notes: Verified insurance status came back as out_of_network for Kaiser HMO. Per policy, do NOT hold a slot until a benefits conversation has happened with the family. Call them to discuss options.
args.title: Benefits conversation for Owen Brooks (out-of-network payer)

args.body: Thank you for the referral for Owen. We've received the OT evaluation request and noted the morning preference. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for our practice, our billing team will reach out to Rachel to review benefits before any evaluation slot is scheduled.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing should call the family for a benefits conversation before any slot is offered.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for the referral for Owen. We've received the OT evaluation request and noted the morning preference. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for our practice, our billing team will reach out to Rachel to review benefits before any evaluation slot is scheduled.
items.decision_rationale: Complete referral intake for OT eval. Kaiser is OON per policy, so billing benefits conversation required before holding a slot. Routine priority. Insurance verification returned out_of_network; OON gating applied — no slot held.

args.notes: Inbox sender claims to be the parent/guardian of Mateo Ramirez but does not match the guardian-of-record on file (Sofia Ramirez). Do NOT confirm any chart details, hold a slot under the existing patient record, or send a personalized acknowledgement until intake has verified the sender's identity by phone using information not present in this message. Sender as claimed: "Carla Mendez, 555-0104, carla.mendez@example.com".
args.title: Identity verification required for Mateo Ramirez (item_4)

args.body: Thank you for reaching out. Before we can discuss any specifics, our intake team will need to verify a few details by phone. A team member will call you shortly using the contact information you provided.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake to phone-verify the sender's identity against the guardian-of-record before any chart access, slot hold, or personalized reply.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Before we can discuss any specifics, our intake team will need to verify a few details by phone. A team member will call you shortly using the contact information you provided.
items.decision_rationale: Complete new referral with parent contact, DOB, discipline (PT), and in-network Aetna details. No urgent or safeguarding signals; routine intake handling. Guardian-of-record on file (Sofia Ramirez) does not match the inbox sender's claimed name; routed for identity verification before any chart-bound action.

args.notes: Parent asked a clinical question. Do not provide an opinion in writing. Offer a screening call or evaluation slot per service-lines policy.
args.title: Clinical question from Jordan Kim via parent portal — route to screening

args.body: Thank you for reaching out about Ava. We're not able to provide clinical advice by message, but our SLP team would be glad to help through a brief screening or evaluation, which is the best way to answer your question. If you'd like, our intake team can follow up to discuss next steps.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake should call or message the family to offer a screening/evaluation. Do not provide clinical advice in writing.

args.notes: Noah Patel needs a same-day reschedule of today's OT appointment. Family's words: "URGENT!!! Noah Patel threw up at school and I can't make today's 3pm OT appointment. Noah's DOB is 2017-11-02. Please reschedule!!! You can call or email me, 555-0108.". Call family to confirm preferred reschedule time and provider availability; do NOT auto-schedule.
args.title: Same-day reschedule for Noah Patel

args.body: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he isn't feeling well. Our front desk will reach out shortly to confirm the cancellation of today's 3pm OT appointment and help find a new time that works for you.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should call the family to confirm a new time within today. No appointment is held until staff confirms.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he isn't feeling well. Our front desk will reach out shortly to confirm the cancellation of today's 3pm OT appointment and help find a new time that works for you.
items.decision_rationale: Same-day cancellation of an existing OT appointment due to illness; existing patient, operational P1 per policy.
